testimonials.quote: Manasa is a self-motivated and rare to find passionate professional. She has out-of-box thinking and approaches a problem with "can do" attitude. She is a quick learner and fast to adapt to any new change.
testimonials.author: Prem Sureddy
testimonials.title: Senior Enterprise Architect at Ericsson Malaysia

testimonials.quote: Ms. Hari exhibited professionalism, eagerness and organizational leadership skills to solve the tasks she was assigned. Her communication and presentation skills are excellent.
testimonials.author: Christoph Emmersberger
testimonials.title: Director, Engineering at Taulia Inc.

testimonials.quote: I know Manasa since when I was working as her Teaching Assistant in her Machine Learning class. She is smart, diligent, and hardworking. She demonstrated leadership in her course project work.
testimonials.author: Shabari Girish Ganapathy

career.title: RAG & Agentic AI Professional Specialization
career.description: Completed the RAG & Agentic AI Professional Specialization at IBM, building production-oriented capstone projects across Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), agentic and multi-agent architectures with memory and feedback loops, prompt and tool orchestration with LangChain, collaborative agent workflows with CrewAI and LangGraph, and API-integrated multi-step reasoning pipelines.
